mapper.select: SELECT audit_point_name AS id, audit_point_name AS "name" FROM hpeapm."audit_elements_info"

SELECT a.*, cc.modeling_method AS modelingMethod, b.examine_user AS examine_user, b.examine_dept AS examine_dept, b.submit_remarks AS remarks FROM ( select *, '0' AS isExamine from ( SELECT * FROM "hpeapm"."spl_model_type" WHERE 1=1
AND dock_deputy like '%' || #{deputyAccountNumber} || '%'
AND audit_point_number like '%' || #{auditPointNumber} || '%'
AND audit_point_name like '%' || #{auditPointName} || '%'
AND audit_model_number like '%' || #{auditModelNumber} || '%'
AND audit_model_name like '%' || #{auditModelName} || '%'
AND write_time like '%' || #{writeTime} || '%'
AND audit_model_type like '%' || #{auditModelType} || '%'
ORDER BY creat_time DESC ) a
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{page}
) a LEFT JOIN "hpeapm"."audit_elements_model_evaluation" cc ON a.audit_model_number = cc.audit_model_number and cc.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM "hpeapm"."spl_business_examine" ) b ON a.examine_id = b.id

SELECT count(*) as "count" FROM "hpeapm"."spl_model_type" WHERE 1=1
AND "dock_deputy" like '%' || #{deputyAccountNumber} || '%'
AND "audit_point_number" like '%' || #{auditPointNumber} || '%'
AND "audit_point_name" like '%' || #{auditPointName} || '%'
AND "audit_model_number" like '%' || #{auditModelNumber} || '%'
AND "audit_model_name" like '%' || #{auditModelName} || '%'
AND "write_time" like '%' || #{writeTime} || '%'
AND "audit_model_type" like '%' || #{auditModelType} || '%'

SELECT a."db_id" as "dbYbId", a."db_type" as "dbType", b."audit_point_name" AS "auditPointName", b."audit_point_number" AS "auditPointNumber", b."audit_model_number" AS "auditModelNumber", b."audit_model_name" AS "auditModelName", b."type_of_information" AS "typeOfInformation", b."dock_people" AS "dockPeople", b."dock_deputy" AS "dockDeputy", b."dock_dept" AS "deckDept", b."creat_time" AS "writeTime", b."audit_model_type" AS "auditModelType", b."continue_to_enter" AS "continueToEnter", c."examine_user" AS "examineUser", c."exam_depy" AS "examDepy", c."examine_dept" AS "examineDept", '1' AS "isExamine", c."examine_type" AS "sptype", c."submit_remarks" AS "remarks", c."id" AS "examinID" FROM "hpeapm"."spl_business_db" a LEFT JOIN "hpeapm"."spl_model_type" b ON a."model_no" = b."audit_model_number" LEFT JOIN "hpeapm"."spl_business_examine" c ON b."examine_id" = c."id" AND a."exam_id" = c."id" WHERE a."is_del" = '1'
AND a."db_deputy" like '%' || #{deputyAccountNumber} || '%'
AND b."audit_point_number" like '%' || #{auditPointNumber} || '%'
AND b."audit_point_name" like '%' || #{auditPointName} || '%'
AND b."audit_model_number" like '%' || #{auditModelNumber} || '%'
AND b."audit_model_name" like '%' || #{auditModelName} || '%'
AND b."write_time" like '%' || #{writeTime} || '%'
AND b."audit_model_type" like '%' || #{auditModelType} || '%'
order by b."creat_time" desc
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{page}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "hpeapm"."spl_business_db" a LEFT JOIN "hpeapm"."spl_model_type" b ON a."model_no" = b."audit_model_number" LEFT JOIN "hpeapm"."spl_business_examine" c ON b."examine_id" = c."id" AND a."exam_id" = c."id" WHERE a."is_del" = '1'
AND a."db_deputy" like '%' || #{deputyAccountNumber} || '%'
AND b."audit_point_number" like '%' || #{auditPointNumber} || '%'
AND b."audit_point_name" like '%' || #{auditPointName} || '%'
AND b."audit_model_number" like '%' || #{auditModelNumber} || '%'
AND b."audit_model_name" like '%' || #{auditModelName} || '%'
AND b."write_time" like '%' || #{writeTime} || '%'
AND b."audit_model_type" like '%' || #{auditModelType} || '%'

SELECT a."db_id" as "dbYbId", b."audit_point_name" AS "auditPointName", b."audit_point_number" AS "auditPointNumber", b."audit_model_number" AS "auditModelNumber", b."audit_model_name" AS "auditModelName", b."type_of_information" AS "typeOfInformation", b."dock_people" AS "dockPeople", b."dock_deputy" AS "dockDeputy", b."dock_dept" AS "deckDept", b."creat_time" AS "writeTime", b."audit_model_type" AS "auditModelType", b."continue_to_enter" AS "continueToEnter", c."examine_user" AS "examineUser", c."exam_depy" AS "examDepy", c."examine_dept" AS "examineDept", a."is_tx" AS "examineType", '3' AS "isExamine", c."examine_type" AS "sptype", c."submit_remarks" AS "remarks", c."id" AS "examinID" FROM "hpeapm"."spl_mainten_db" a LEFT JOIN "hpeapm"."spl_model_type" b ON a."model_no" = b."audit_model_number" LEFT JOIN "hpeapm"."spl_business_examine" c ON b."examine_id" = c."id" AND a."exam_id" = c."id" WHERE a."role_id" like '%' || #{dockDeputy} || '%'
AND a."is_tx" = '%'||#{txType}||'%'
AND b."audit_point_number" like '%' || #{auditPointNumber} || '%'
AND b."audit_point_name" like '%' || #{auditPointName} || '%'
AND b."audit_model_number" like '%' || #{auditModelNumber} || '%'
AND b."audit_model_name" like '%' || #{auditModelName} || '%'
AND b."write_time" like '%' || #{writeTime} || '%'
AND b."audit_model_type" like '%' || #{auditModelType} || '%'
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{page}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "hpeapm"."spl_mainten_db" a LEFT JOIN "hpeapm"."spl_model_type" b ON a."model_no" = b."audit_model_number" LEFT JOIN "hpeapm"."spl_business_examine" c ON b."examine_id" = c."id" AND a."exam_id" = c."id" WHERE a."role_id" like '%' || #{dockDeputy} || '%'
AND a."is_tx" = '%'||#{txType}||'%'
AND b."audit_point_number" like '%' || #{auditPointNumber} || '%'
AND b."audit_point_name" like '%' || #{auditPointName} || '%'
AND b."audit_model_number" like '%' || #{auditModelNumber} || '%'
AND b."audit_model_name" like '%' || #{auditModelName} || '%'
AND b."write_time" like '%' || #{writeTime} || '%'
AND b."audit_model_type" like '%' || #{auditModelType} || '%'

SELECT a."id" AS examinID , b."audit_point_number" AS auditPointNumber, b."audit_point_name" AS auditPointName, b."audit_model_number" AS auditModelNumber, b."audit_model_name" AS auditModelName, b."type_of_information" AS typeOfInformation, a."examine_user" AS examineUser, b."dock_people" AS dockPeople, b."dock_dept" AS deckDept, a."submit_remarks" as remarks, a."examine_result" examineResult, a."examine_type" examineType, b."write_time" AS writeTime, b."audit_model_type" AS auditModelType, '2' AS isExamine, a."submit_remarks" AS submitRemarks, a."examine_result" as examineResult, a."examine_type" as examineType, c."role_name" roleName, c."dept_name" DeptName, c."ope_type" opeType, c."ope_user" opeUser, COALESCE(c."next_user", '无') newUser, c."reoly_type" reolyType, c."reoly_remarks" reolyRemarks, TO_CHAR(c."ope_time", 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') opeTime FROM hpeapm."spl_business_examine" a LEFT JOIN hpeapm."spl_model_type" b ON a."audit_model_number" = b."audit_model_number" LEFT JOIN hpeapm."spl_workitem_his" c ON a."id" = c."examine_id" where 1=1
AND b.audit_point_number like '%' || #{auditPointNumber} || '%'
AND b.audit_point_name like '%' || #{auditPointName} || '%'
AND b.audit_model_number like '%' || #{auditModelNumber} || '%'
AND b.audit_model_name like '%' || #{auditModelName} || '%'
AND b.write_time like '%' || #{writeTime} || '%'
AND b.audit_model_type like '%' || #{auditModelType} || '%'
ORDER BY a.submit_time desc,a."create_time" desc,c."ope_time" desc
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{page}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS num FROM hpeapm."spl_business_examine" a LEFT JOIN hpeapm."spl_model_type" b ON a."audit_model_number" = b."audit_model_number" WHERE 1=1
AND b.audit_point_number like '%' || #{auditPointNumber} || '%'
AND b.audit_point_name like '%' || #{auditPointName} || '%'
AND b.audit_model_number like '%' || #{auditModelNumber} || '%'
AND b.audit_model_name like '%' || #{auditModelName} || '%'
AND b.write_time like '%' || #{writeTime} || '%'
AND b.audit_model_type like '%' || #{auditModelType} || '%'

SELECT COUNT(*) "COUNT" FROM hpeapm."audit_elements_operation_steps" WHERE information_type like '%' || #{informationType} || '%' AND audit_model_number like '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%' AND delete_status = '1'
SELECT "status" as status FROM hpeapm."audit_elements_operation_steps" WHERE audit_model_number like '%' || #{auditModelNumber} || '%' and delete_status = '1' ORDER BY "status" DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hpeapm."audit_elements_operation_steps" (dock_phone, dock_people, write_time, dock_department, audit_point_number, audit_point_name, audit_model_number, audit_model_name, information_type, type_of_information, "status", continue_to_enter, current_input, is_import, detailed_time) VALUES (#{dockPhone}, #{dockPeople}, #{writeTime}, #{dockDepartment}, #{auditPointNumber}, #{auditPointName}, #{auditModelNumber}, #{auditModelName}, #{informationType}, #{typeOfInformation}, #{status}, #{continueToEnter}, #{currentInput}, #{isImport}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

update.if: UPDATE hpeapm."audit_elements_operation_steps" SET "status" = '0', continue_to_enter = '0', current_input = '0', type_of_information='模型信息预览' WHERE audit_model_number= '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%' and delete_status='1'
UPDATE hpeapm."audit_elements_operation_steps" SET type_of_information= '%'||#{typeOfInformation}||'%' WHERE audit_model_number= '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%' and delete_status='1'

mapper.update: UPDATE hpeapm."audit_elements_operation_steps" SET dock_people= '%'||#{dockPeople}||'%', dock_phone= '%'||#{dockPhone}||'%', write_time= '%'||#{writeTime}||'%', dock_department= '%'||#{dockDepartment}||'%' WHERE audit_model_number like '%' || #{auditModelNumber} || '%' and information_type like '%'||#{informationType}||'%' and delete_status = '1'

UPDATE hpeapm."audit_elements_operation_steps" SET continue_to_enter = '%'||#{continueToEnter}||'%', "status" = '%'||#{status}||'%', current_input = '%'||#{currentInput}||'%' WHERE audit_model_number like '%' || #{auditModelNumber} || '%' AND delete_status != '0'

update.if: UPDATE hpeapm."audit_elements_operation_steps" SET "status" = CASE WHEN information_type = '审计模型设计' THEN '1' WHEN information_type = '审计模型来源信息' THEN '2' WHEN information_type = '数据支撑能力' THEN '3' WHEN information_type = '审计模型部署' THEN '4' ELSE '0' END, current_input = CASE WHEN information_type = '审计模型设计' THEN '1' WHEN information_type = '审计模型来源信息' THEN '2' WHEN information_type = '数据支撑能力' THEN '3' WHEN information_type = '审计模型部署' THEN '4' ELSE '0' END, continue_to_enter = CASE WHEN information_type = '审计模型设计' THEN '2' WHEN information_type = '审计模型来源信息' THEN '3' WHEN information_type = '数据支撑能力' THEN '4' WHEN information_type = '审计模型部署' THEN '5' ELSE '0' END, type_of_information= '%'||#{typeOfInformation}||'%' WHERE audit_model_number like '%' || #{auditModelNumber} || '%' and delete_status !='0'
UPDATE hpeapm."audit_elements_operation_steps" SET type_of_information= '%'||#{typeOfInformation}||'%' WHERE audit_model_number= '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%' and delete_status='1'

mapper.update: UPDATE hpeapm."audit_elements_operation_steps" SET delete_status='0' WHERE audit_model_number like '%' || #{auditModelNumber} || '%' and information_type like '%'||#{informationType}||'%' and delete_status = '1'
mapper.select: SELECT write_time FROM hpeapm."audit_elements_operation_steps" WHERE audit_model_number like '%' || #{auditModelNumber} || '%' AND delete_status = '1' and "status" = '2'

SELECT COUNT(*) 'COUNT' FROM hpeapm."audit_elements_operation_steps" WHERE delete_status = '1' AND audit_model_number like '%'||#{pointModelNumber}||'%' AND information_type like '%'||#{typeOfInformation}||'%'
SELECT COUNT(*) con FROM hpeapm."audit_elements_operation_steps" WHERE audit_model_number like '%' || #{auditModelNumber} || '%' AND delete_status!=0
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM hpeapm."audit_elements_info" WHERE audit_model_number like '%' || #{auditModelNumber} || '%'
mapper.update: UPDATE hpeapm."audit_elements_operation_steps" SET end_createtime = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE audit_model_number like '%' || #{auditModelNumber} || '%'
UPDATE hpeapm."audit_elements_operation_steps" SET delete_status='0' WHERE audit_model_number like '%' || #{auditModelNumber} || '%' and delete_status = '1'
mapper.select: SELECT dock_dept AS "user" FROM hpeapm."spl_model_type" WHERE audit_model_number like '%'||#{audit_model_number}||'%'

SELECT dock_phone AS dockPhone, dock_people AS dockPeople, dock_department AS dockDepartment FROM hpeapm."audit_elements_operation_steps" WHERE information_type = '审计模型部署' AND audit_model_number like '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%' AND delete_status != '0'

SELECT DISTINCT b."audit_point_name" AS "label", b."audit_point_name" AS "value" FROM hpeapm.spl_mainten_db a LEFT JOIN hpeapm.audit_elements_info b ON a."model_no" = b."audit_model_number" WHERE a."role_id" = '6E1774EFE55D4F96857ECFBC30573E73' AND b."audit_point_name" IS NOT NULL

SELECT DISTINCT b."audit_model_name" AS "auditModelNumber", b."audit_model_name" AS "auditModelName" FROM hpeapm.spl_mainten_db a LEFT JOIN hpeapm.audit_elements_info b ON a."model_no" = b."audit_model_number" WHERE a."role_id" = '6E1774EFE55D4F96857ECFBC30573E73' AND b."audit_point_name" IS NOT NULL
